## Objective
Describe what this slice delivers in 1–2 sentences.

## Requirements (scope)

- Component(s) impacted:
- Invariants involved:
- Errors/edge cases:

- [ ] Test case 3

## Implementation tasks

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Coverage >= 75%
- [ ] Slice merged via PR
